modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: PowerPoint file won't open on Windows 10

full_description_text:  
I can't open my PowerPoint file. It just won't open at all. I'm using Windows 10 and Microsoft PowerPoint, but nothing happens when I try. This is really frustrating because I need to access my presentation.
short_description: PowerPoint file won't open on Windows 10
description: I can't open my PowerPoint file. It just won't open at all. I'm using Windows 10 and Microsoft PowerPoint, but nothing happens when I try. This is really frustrating because I need to access my presentation.
